## What happened?

Describe the issue.

## Where did it happen?

- [ ] Installation
- [ ] Skill trigger
- [ ] Stage 1 product analysis
- [ ] Stage 2 direction proposal
- [ ] Stage 3 prompt production
- [ ] Documentation

## Product category

Example: sunglasses, pet product, home appliance, beauty product.

## Expected behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual behavior

What happened instead?

## Safety issue involved?

- [ ] Invented product facts
- [ ] Changed product shape or color
- [ ] Copied competitor assets
- [ ] Generated unsafe claims
- [ ] Other
